12/20/94 PATTY DOWLING, REPORTER, G.MCGREW CLERK 11:02AM C/C FOR TRAIL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. DEFT REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL. 11:06AM WITNESS LA RUE GRIME SWORN & EXAMINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #1 LETER FROM DEFT. TO PLAINTFF FOR ID & EVIDENCE. " #2 LETTER BY PLAINTIFF FOR ID & EVIDENCE. " #3 COPY OF LETTER PLAINTIFF SENT TO DEFT. FOR ID & EVIDENCE. 11:34AM EXHIBITS ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. 11:36AM CROSS EXAMINATION 11:50AM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REST. SUBMITTED TO COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT KENYATTA, MAISHA PLAINTIFFRECOVER NOTHING BY WAY OF HIS COMPLAINT & THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CROSS COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE IN THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FAILED TO TRANSFER CROSS COMPLAINT AS ORDERED BY THE COURT. BOTH SIDES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
